nl_query: Count revaluation extensions approved per board.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(reva.id) AS approved_extensions
FROM board b
JOIN revaluation_extension_request reva ON reva.board_id = b.id
JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = reva.resulting_attempt_id
WHERE reva.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY b.id
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: revaluation_request does NOT have board_id. Join via answer_script and board.
